title: THE TWIDDLERS - 2 Christmas Nutcracker Soldiers with Moveable Parts, Snow King, Festive Decor - 25cm / 10" - Handmade Wooden Decorative Ornaments in Silver and Gold
features: 🎄Handmade Craftsmanship: Bring back fond nostalgic childhood memories this Christmas and share them with the next generation. These Christmas Nutcracker Soldiers are meticulously handcrafted to perfection, exuding an air of timeless elegance that will elevate your holiday decor.

🎄Traditional Decoration: Nutcrackers are a traditional festive decoration loved by all ages around the world. Our set of two Nutcracker Soldiers, beautifully representing different cultures and multicultural charm in stunning Silver White and Gold Brown Nutcracker Multiracial designs.
🎄Memories That Last: Made from premium pine and lotus wood, these durable soldiers will allow you to make cherished Christmas memories for years to come!
🎄Elegant and Handcrafted: The dimensions of the king silver & white nutcracker is 7.5 x 6.1 x 25.5cm, and the gold & black nutcracker drummer is 8 x 7.5 x 25.5 cm.

🎄Satisfaction Guaranteed: The Twiddlers is a trusted UK-based brand, and we offer a 100% one year warranty on all of our products. If you have any queries about a product, please do not hesitate to get in contact with our customer service team, who will be happy to help.
description: Product Description Handcrafted Christmas is a time of magic and our wooden soldiers capture that spirit perfectly - they're symbols of the joy and fellowship that the season brings. Countdown to Christmas! Count down to Christmas with our nutcrackers that keep time and cracks smiles! Our Nutcracker Christmas decorations include various size options, from miniature collectibles to life-size editions in a variety of styles, to suit all types of spaces. Paint It Yourself! Unleash your creativity and paint your own nutcracker, make it truly one-of-a-kind and crackin' fine! Versatile Our Nutcracker Christmas decorations include various size options, from miniature collectibles to life-size editions, to suit all types of spaces. Moving Mouths Adorned in traditional colours, our wooden Christmas decorations will effortlessly blend in with your seasonal decor, the moving mouths will bring the character to life, and children will be enchanted by their fun expressions, while adults will appreciate the nostalgia they bring. Gift Boxed Elegantly presented in a stunning gift box—perfect for gifting in the holiday season.
